pitch_global: Put this man at his home, sitting at his desk, browsing through travel websites. This person is hesitating, but then he takes a deep breath and clicks 'book now' for an overwater villa in the Maldives. Put this man at the Maldives, stepping into the luxurious villa. This person is overwhelmed with joy, taking in the breathtaking view of the ocean. Put this man on the villa's deck, lying on a sunbed, feeling the warm sun on his skin. This person is smiling, feeling the serenity and peace of the moment. Put this man at the edge of the villa, dipping his feet into the crystal-clear water. This person is laughing, feeling a sense of adventure and freedom. Put this man at sunset, sitting on the deck, watching the sky change colors. This person is content, realizing he deserves this happiness and luxury.

imaginaire_collectif.imaginaire: An idyllic overwater villa in the Maldives, surrounded by turquoise waters and vibrant coral reefs. The villa stands on stilts over the crystal-clear lagoon, with a private deck leading to the ocean. The sky is a perfect azure, dotted with fluffy white clouds. Palm trees sway gently in the warm breeze, and the sun casts a golden glow over the serene landscape, creating a postcard-perfect paradise.

start.position_protagoniste: sitting at desk, looking at laptop screen

end.position_protagoniste: leaning back in chair, smiling at laptop

start.position_protagoniste: standing at villa entrance, holding suitcase

end.position_protagoniste: standing inside villa, arms open wide
sitting up on sunbed, looking at ocean

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael sits at his desk, browsing travel websites. He hesitates, fidgeting with a pen, before taking a deep breath and clicking 'book now' for an overwater villa in the Maldives. A smile spreads across his face as excitement fills the room.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting upright, leaning back with a smile
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From sitting upright, fidgeting with a pen, to leaning back with a smile

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Arriving at the Maldives, Mickael stands at the entrance of the luxurious villa, holding his suitcase. He steps inside, overwhelmed with joy, and opens his arms wide to embrace the breathtaking ocean view.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Standing with arms open wide in joy
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From standing at the entrance holding a suitcase to inside the villa with arms open wide

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael lies on a sunbed on the villa's deck, feeling the warm sun on his skin. He smiles softly, hands behind his head, enjoying the serenity and peace of the moment.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Lying relaxed on sunbed, hands behind head
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From lying on sunbed to sitting up, looking at the ocean

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: At the edge of the villa, Mickael dips his feet into the crystal-clear water, splashing gently. He leans back, laughing, feeling a sense of adventure and freedom.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting with feet in water, leaning back with laughter
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From sitting at the edge, splashing water, to leaning back laughing

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: As the sun sets, Mickael sits on the deck, watching the sky change colors. He rests his chin on his hand, then leans back, arms resting on the deck, sighing with satisfaction at the realization of deserving this happiness and luxury.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting contently, leaning back with arms resting
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From sitting with chin on hand to leaning back, arms resting

cadrages.justification_plan: Allows us to see Mickael's interaction with the laptop and his expressions of hesitation and decision-making.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Enhances the moment of decision as Mickael clicks 'book now', drawing the viewer into his personal space.
cadrages.justification_angle: Facilitates viewer identification with Mickael's internal conflict and eventual excitement.

cadrages.justification_plan: Captures the grandeur of the villa and the ocean view, emphasizing Mickael's awe and joy.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Allows the viewer to take in the breathtaking scene alongside Mickael, reinforcing his sense of wonder.
cadrages.justification_angle: Maintains a neutral perspective, allowing the viewer to share in Mickael's joy and awe naturally.

cadrages.justification_plan: Focuses on Mickael's relaxed posture and serene expression, highlighting his peace and contentment.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Gradually reveals the expansive ocean view, enhancing the sense of tranquility and space.
cadrages.justification_angle: Keeps the viewer on the same level as Mickael, fostering a connection to his serene experience.

cadrages.justification_plan: Shows Mickael's playful interaction with the water, capturing his laughter and sense of freedom.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Follows Mickael's movements, emphasizing the fluidity and joy of the moment.
cadrages.justification_angle: Allows the viewer to experience Mickael's sense of adventure and freedom alongside him.

cadrages.justification_plan: Encompasses the vastness of the sunset and ocean, symbolizing Mickael's realization and contentment.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Lets the viewer absorb the changing colors of the sky, mirroring Mickael's reflective state.
cadrages.justification_angle: Provides a balanced view of Mickael's peaceful contemplation, inviting the viewer to share in his realization.

scenes.justification: Scène d'ouverture, immersion nécessaire pour montrer la décision cruciale de réserver le voyage.
Transition rapide vers l'arrivée à la villa, capturant le moment de joie et d'émerveillement.
Moment de détente sur le pont, montrant la sérénité et la paix ressenties par le protagoniste.
Scène d'aventure et de liberté, illustrant le plaisir et l'excitation de l'expérience aquatique.
Scène finale, impact émotionnel fort en réalisant le bonheur et le luxe mérité.

prompts_video.prompt: Put this man at his home office, sitting at a desk with a laptop open to travel websites. The afternoon light filters softly through the window, casting a warm glow. This man, wearing a blue casual shirt and dark jeans with sneakers, hesitates as he fidgets with a pen. His reading glasses rest on his nose. The camera captures a medium shot at eye level, slowly pushing in as he takes a deep breath and clicks 'book now' with a smile. The scene transitions from hesitation to excitement, as he leans back in his chair, smiling at the laptop screen.

Put this man at the entrance of an overwater villa in the Maldives, overlooking the ocean in the morning light. He stands holding a suitcase, wearing a white linen shirt, beige shorts, and sandals, with sunglasses and a straw hat. The camera captures a wide shot from a slight low angle, emphasizing the villa's grandeur. As he steps inside, arms open wide, joy overwhelms him. The scene moves from anticipation to awe, with a slow push in highlighting his joyful expression as he takes in the breathtaking view.

Put this man on the villa's deck, lying on a sunbed facing the ocean at midday. He wears a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat. The camera captures a medium shot at eye level, showing him with hands behind his head, smiling softly. The scene transitions from excitement to serenity, as he sits up, looking out at the ocean, feeling peace. A slow lateral tracking shot accompanies his movement, capturing the tranquil atmosphere.

Put this man at the edge of the villa, dipping his feet into the crystal-clear water in the afternoon. He wears a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat. The camera captures a medium close-up at eye level, focusing on his laughter as he leans back, splashing water with his feet. The scene transitions from calmness to a sense of adventure and freedom, with a slow pull out revealing the expansive ocean.

Put this man on the deck of the villa, sitting with a view of the sunset over the ocean in the evening. He wears a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat. The camera captures a wide shot at a slight high angle, showing him resting his chin on his hand, content. As the sky changes colors, he leans back, arms resting on the deck, sighing with satisfaction. The scene moves from joy to realization, with a slow pan capturing the serene sunset.

prompt_bande_son: Create a serene and uplifting ambient soundtrack featuring gentle ocean waves, soft tropical bird calls, and light instrumental music. The music should evoke a sense of luxury, tranquility, and adventure, perfectly complementing the visual journey from hesitation to fulfillment in the Maldives.

metadata.dream: I dream of being in an overwater villa in the Maldives
